summary: Hydrated preflight keeps #42771 as the best open canonical PR for the Docker Playwright browser path issue. #42819 is the paired same-author issue and should remain open until #42771 is reviewed, repaired, landed, replaced, or closed. No close/comment/label mutation is planned because instant close is disabled and current main remains unfixed.

actions.reason: #42771 is the best surviving canonical implementation path, but it is not merge-ready and this dedupe-only job blocks merge, fix, and raise_pr actions.
#42819 is the paired bug report for canonical PR #42771, but current main is not fixed and the canonical PR has not landed, so no duplicate or fixed-by-candidate closure is safe in this run.
